steps.title: Spot the opening parenthesis
steps.content: The sentence opens a parenthesis after cinch with (a ______. To keep the parentheses balanced, we need a closing parenthesis right after the word that defines cinch.

steps.title: Choose the closing parenthesis
steps.content: Choice B) belt) puts the closing parenthesis immediately after belt, completing the parenthetical definition. The other three either leave the parenthesis open or insert a semicolon, em dash, or comma inside the parentheses, which breaks the sentence structure. That matches choice B — B is correct.
